title: leucas mollissima subsp. chinensis
intro: Leucas mollissima subsp. chinensis, also known as Chinese hairy mint, is a plant species within the Lamiaceae family, characterized by its hairy leaves and stems. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Leucas mollissima subsp. chinensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, and its leaves can also be used fresh in cooking or as a garnish.
